message:
fix(ci): clone fastmcp_rust sibling in dist.yml

v0.2.47's dist.yml run failed with 'failed to load source for
dependency fastmcp-core / No such file or directory' across all four
build targets. The workspace [patch.crates-io] block has pointed at
../fastmcp_rust/crates/fastmcp since the fastmcp 0.3 migration landed,
but dist.yml's "Clone sibling dependencies" step was never updated to
fetch it.

Add git clone --depth 1 .../fastmcp_rust ../fastmcp_rust to all
three jobs (lint, test, build).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -24,6 +24,7 @@ jobs:
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite ../frankensqlite
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui ../frankentui
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust ../beads_rust
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/fastmcp_rust ../fastmcp_rust
 
       - name: Install system dependencies
         run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libsqlite3-dev
@@ -53,6 +54,7 @@ jobs:
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite ../frankensqlite
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui ../frankentui
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust ../beads_rust
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/fastmcp_rust ../fastmcp_rust
 
       - name: Install system dependencies
         run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libsqlite3-dev
@@ -99,6 +101,7 @@ jobs:
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite ../frankensqlite
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui ../frankentui
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust ../beads_rust
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/fastmcp_rust ../fastmcp_rust
 
       - name: Install Rust nightly
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
